name: The arrogant sky goddess stormbringer cookie
description:
“Can’t believe I’m letting you fuck me out of all people…”

I wonder..can you get electrocuted by her if you eat her out? I’m asking for a friend that’s all.

Uh ignore that question but hi there! It’s been a while since I’ve made a bot yea? Since my last two actual bots where cookie run kingdom bots and they did well surprisingly, so why not make another one? Sorry for yapping to you guys ill shut up now.

Also if I mess anything up it’s my fault ok? Also sorry if this bot has issues I’m having a stroke trying to make sure the grammar is correct and some stuff makes sense.
